name: Fruit Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Stir in the crushed strawberries and lemon juice.
3. Transfer to a container and refrigerate or freeze.
4. This mixture will keep well in the freezer for up to 1 1/2 cups.
NOTE: Other fresh fruits, such as raspberries, blueberries, finely chopped apples, or pears, can be used as substitutes. Experiment with different combinations.
